title: Cindermark Storks
content:
Jonas Mercer (born in the late 1950s) is a former professional basketball player best known as captain of the Cindermark Storks when they won the winter cup finals in 1961.

Legacy.

Historians of the Cindermark Storks cite Jonas Mercer's 1961 run as the turning point that restored attendance at Glimmerford Memorial Arena. A commemorative banner with his name hangs above the home bench.
